property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:/Users/SRINIVASGARU/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.11.v20260515-1531/jre/bin/server;C:/Users/SRINIVASGARU/.p2/pool/plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_21.0.11.v20260515-1531/jre/bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\SRINIVASGARU\Downloads\allure-2.43.0\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.3\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\SRINIVASGARU\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\SRINIVASGARU\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\SRINIVASGARU\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\SRINIVASGARU\Desktop;;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify user lands on home page after login", "DemoBlaze Product and Cart Functionality"](1)
testcase.system-out:
2026-07-06 22:40:45 [main] WARN TestNGContentHandler - It is strongly recommended to add "<!DOCTYPE suite SYSTEM "https://testng.org/testng-1.1.dtd" >" at the top of the suite file [F:\java\Demo\testng.xml] otherwise TestNG may fail or not work as expected. 2026-07-06 22:40:46 [main] WARN TestNG - Ignoring duplicate listener : io.qameta.allure.testng.AllureTestNg 2026-07-06 22:40:46 [main] WARN TestNG - Ignoring duplicate listener : io.qameta.allure.testng.AllureTestNg 2026-07-06 22:40:46 [main] WARN TestNG - Ignoring duplicate listener : io.qameta.allure.testng.AllureTestNg 2026-07-06 22:40:46 [main] INFO TestListener - ===== Test Execution Started ===== 2026-07-06 22:40:49 [main] INFO TestListener - Test Started : runScenario
Scenario: Verify user lands on home page after login # src/test/resources/features/LoginAndHome.feature:8 2026-07-06 22:40:49 [main] INFO Hooks - ================================== 2026-07-06 22:40:49 [main] INFO Hooks - Starting Test Execution 2026-07-06 22:40:49 [main] INFO Hooks - Launching Chrome Browser 2026-07-06 22:40:56 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Launching App Given User launches the DemoBlaze application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.launch() Sheet Name Requested : Login Available Sheets: Login 2026-07-06 22:41:01 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Login executed When User logs in using Excel data # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.loginExcel() 2026-07-06 22:41:01 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Verifying login Then User should be logged in successfully # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.verifyLogin() 2026-07-06 22:41:01 [main] INFO HomeSteps - Welcome text: Welcome srinugem123 Then User should see welcome message with username # stepdefinitions.HomeSteps.user_should_see_welcome_message_with_username() And User should see product list displayed # stepdefinitions.HomeSteps.user_should_see_product_list_displayed() 2026-07-06 22:41:02 [main] INFO Hooks - Test Execution Completed
testcase.system-err: Jul 06, 2026 10:40:55 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 06, 2026 10:40:55 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.197. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify product details after selecting a product", "DemoBlaze Product and Cart Functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out:
2026-07-06 22:41:02 [main] INFO TestListener - Test Passed : runScenario 2026-07-06 22:41:02 [main] INFO TestListener - Test Started : runScenario
Scenario: Verify product details after selecting a product # src/test/resources/features/LoginAndHome.feature:12 2026-07-06 22:41:02 [main] INFO Hooks - ================================== 2026-07-06 22:41:02 [main] INFO Hooks - Starting Test Execution 2026-07-06 22:41:02 [main] INFO Hooks - Launching Chrome Browser 2026-07-06 22:41:05 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Launching App Given User launches the DemoBlaze application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.launch() Sheet Name Requested : Login Available Sheets: Login 2026-07-06 22:41:10 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Login executed When User logs in using Excel data # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.loginExcel() 2026-07-06 22:41:10 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Verifying login Then User should be logged in successfully # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.verifyLogin() 2026-07-06 22:41:11 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.xpath: //a[text()='Samsung galaxy s6'] 2026-07-06 22:41:11 [main] INFO HomeSteps - Clicked on Product: Samsung galaxy s6 When User clicks on "Samsung galaxy s6" product # stepdefinitions.HomeSteps.user_clicks_on_product(java.lang.String) 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO ProductDetailsSteps - Product Details page displayed successfully. Then User should see the product details page # stepdefinitions.ProductDetailsSteps.user_should_see_the_product_details_page() 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO ProductDetailsSteps - Product Name: Samsung galaxy s6 And User should verify the product name # stepdefinitions.ProductDetailsSteps.user_should_verify_the_product_name() 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO ProductDetailsSteps - Product Price: $360 *includes tax And User should verify the product price # stepdefinitions.ProductDetailsSteps.user_should_verify_the_product_price() 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO ProductDetailsSteps - Product Description: The Samsung Galaxy S6 is powered by 1.5GHz octa-core Samsung Exynos 7420 processor and it comes with 3GB of RAM. The phone packs 32GB of internal storage cannot be expanded. And User should verify the product description # stepdefinitions.ProductDetailsSteps.user_should_verify_the_product_description() 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO Hooks - Test Execution Completed
testcase.system-err: Jul 06, 2026 10:41:04 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 06, 2026 10:41:04 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.197. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify user can add product to cart successfully", "DemoBlaze Product and Cart Functionality"](3)
testcase.system-out:
2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO TestListener - Test Passed : runScenario 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO TestListener - Test Started : runScenario
Scenario: Verify user can add product to cart successfully # src/test/resources/features/LoginAndHome.feature:19 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO Hooks - ================================== 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO Hooks - Starting Test Execution 2026-07-06 22:41:12 [main] INFO Hooks - Launching Chrome Browser 2026-07-06 22:41:15 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Launching App Given User launches the DemoBlaze application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.launch() Sheet Name Requested : Login Available Sheets: Login 2026-07-06 22:41:19 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Login executed When User logs in using Excel data # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.loginExcel() 2026-07-06 22:41:19 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Verifying login Then User should be logged in successfully # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.verifyLogin() 2026-07-06 22:41:20 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.xpath: //a[text()='Samsung galaxy s6'] 2026-07-06 22:41:20 [main] INFO HomeSteps - Clicked on Product: Samsung galaxy s6 When User clicks on "Samsung galaxy s6" product # stepdefinitions.HomeSteps.user_clicks_on_product(java.lang.String) 2026-07-06 22:41:21 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.linkText: Add to cart 2026-07-06 22:41:21 [main] INFO CartSteps - Clicked on Add to Cart button. And User clicks on "Add to cart" button # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_clicks_on_button(java.lang.String) 2026-07-06 22:41:22 [main] INFO CartSteps - Alert accepted successfully. And User accepts the alert # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_accepts_the_alert() 2026-07-06 22:41:23 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.id: cartur 2026-07-06 22:41:28 [main] INFO CartSteps - Product added to cart successfully. And User should see the product added to cart successfully # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_should_see_the_product_added_to_cart_successfully() 2026-07-06 22:41:28 [main] INFO Hooks - Test Execution Completed
testcase.system-err: Jul 06, 2026 10:41:14 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 06, 2026 10:41:14 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.197. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify user can purchase product successfully", "DemoBlaze Product and Cart Functionality"](4)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //button[text()='OK1'] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.197, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.155 (07b52360cc1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\SRINIV~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57619}, goog:processID: 9204, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57619/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.197, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6c31c9e2d4926cad60a650eea43941b4

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //button[text()='OK1'] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.197, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.155 (07b52360cc1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\SRINIV~1\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:57619}, goog:processID: 9204, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:57619/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.197, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 6c31c9e2d4926cad60a650eea43941b4 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at utilities.ActionUtils.click(ActionUtils.java:54) at pages.PlaceOrderPage.clickOkButton(PlaceOrderPage.java:68) at stepdefinitions.PlaceOrderSteps.user_should_see_order_confirmation_message(PlaceOrderSteps.java:67) at ✽.User accepts confirmation alert(file:///F:/java/Demo/src/test/resources/features/LoginAndHome.feature:34)

2026-07-06 22:41:28 [main] INFO TestListener - Test Passed : runScenario 2026-07-06 22:41:28 [main] INFO TestListener - Test Started : runScenario
Scenario: Verify user can purchase product successfully # src/test/resources/features/LoginAndHome.feature:25 2026-07-06 22:41:28 [main] INFO Hooks - ================================== 2026-07-06 22:41:28 [main] INFO Hooks - Starting Test Execution 2026-07-06 22:41:28 [main] INFO Hooks - Launching Chrome Browser 2026-07-06 22:41:31 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Launching App Given User launches the DemoBlaze application # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.launch() Sheet Name Requested : Login Available Sheets: Login 2026-07-06 22:41:34 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Login executed When User logs in using Excel data # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.loginExcel() 2026-07-06 22:41:34 [main] INFO LoginSteps - Verifying login Then User should be logged in successfully # stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.verifyLogin() 2026-07-06 22:41:35 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.xpath: //a[text()='Samsung galaxy s6'] 2026-07-06 22:41:35 [main] INFO HomeSteps - Clicked on Product: Samsung galaxy s6 When User clicks on "Samsung galaxy s6" product # stepdefinitions.HomeSteps.user_clicks_on_product(java.lang.String) 2026-07-06 22:41:36 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.linkText: Add to cart 2026-07-06 22:41:36 [main] INFO CartSteps - Clicked on Add to Cart button. And User clicks on "Add to cart" button # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_clicks_on_button(java.lang.String) 2026-07-06 22:41:37 [main] INFO CartSteps - Alert accepted successfully. And User accepts the alert # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_accepts_the_alert() 2026-07-06 22:41:39 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.id: cartur 2026-07-06 22:41:44 [main] INFO CartSteps - Product added to cart successfully. And User should see the product added to cart successfully # stepdefinitions.CartSteps.user_should_see_the_product_added_to_cart_successfully() 2026-07-06 22:41:44 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.xpath: //button[text()='Place Order'] 2026-07-06 22:41:49 [main] INFO PlaceOrderSteps - Clicked Place Order button And User clicks on Place Order button # stepdefinitions.PlaceOrderSteps.user_clicks_on_place_order_button() 2026-07-06 22:41:50 [main] INFO PlaceOrderSteps - Entered order details And User enters order details "Srinivas", "India", "Hyderabad", "1234567890123456", "12", "2026" # stepdefinitions.PlaceOrderSteps.user_enters_order_details(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) 2026-07-06 22:41:51 [main] INFO ActionUtils - Clicked on element: By.xpath: //button[text()='Purchase'] 2026-07-06 22:41:51 [main] INFO PlaceOrderSteps - Clicked Purchase button And User clicks on Purchase button # stepdefinitions.PlaceOrderSteps.user_clicks_on_purchase_button() Then User should see order confirmation message # stepdefinitions.PlaceOrderSteps.user_clicks_ok_button() And User accepts confirmation alert # stepdefinitions.PlaceOrderSteps.user_should_see_order_confirmation_message() org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //button[text()='OK1'] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.34.0', revision: '707dcb4246*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.197, chrome: utilities.ActionUtils.click(ActionUtils.java:54) at pages.PlaceOrderPage.clickOkButton(PlaceOrderPage.java:68) at stepdefinitions.PlaceOrderSteps.user_should_see_order_confirmation_message(PlaceOrderSteps.java:67) at âœ½.User accepts confirmation alert(file:///F:/java/Demo/src/test/resources/features/LoginAndHome.feature:34) 2026-07-06 22:42:06 [main] ERROR Hooks - Scenario Failed: Taking Screenshot Screenshot saved at: screenshots/Verify user can purchase product successfully_20260706_224206.png 2026-07-06 22:42:07 [main] INFO Hooks - Test Execution Completed
testcase.system-err: Jul 06, 2026 10:41:30 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 149 Jul 06, 2026 10:41:30 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 149.0.7827.197. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.34.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
